title: VibraModuleSurface
description: Schema for a parsed module root mapping (post-YAML). Module-level keys are symbol names (kebab-case, optional leading `-` for module-private). Function definitions use function.schema.json; other symbols remain loosely described here.

else.description: Non-function symbol definition. Bare un-prefixed annotation keys like `where` and `doc` are rejected (`E-ANNO-002`).
